x-enumeration-literals.name: Blocking Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Places a hold on a specific amount in an account, making it unavailable for general use.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Purpose Specification Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines why the amount is blocked, such as pending transactions, regulatory compliance, disputes, or collateral for loans.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Monitoring & Notification Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Monitors blocked amounts and notifies the customer or relevant internal teams.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reporting & Audit Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Maintains records of all blocked amounts for compliance, reconciliation, and auditing purposes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Release Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Releases funds when the triggering condition is resolved, e.g., dispute settled or collateral requirement met.
